---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Azure OpenAI CLI
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Description

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to ..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen. How would this feature work from a user's perspective?

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered. Why were they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.
